question: What is the total net electrical output of a full 12-module NuScale plant?

nuscale_ch01_0006.title: Power Output
nuscale_ch01_0006.summary: The NuScale Power Plant consists of up to 12 NuScale Power Modules (NPMs), each with a thermal output of 160 MWt and an electrical output of approximately 50 MWe, totaling about 600 MWe for a 12-module facility. After accounting for internal power use (house loads), the net electrical output is around 570 MWe, with design power including a 2% margin for measurement uncertainty.

nuscale_ch01_0008.title: Format and Content
nuscale_ch01_0008.summary: The section describes the NuScale containment vessel as a cylindrical, steel, ASME-certified pressure vessel designed to withstand high-pressure events, with internal vacuum pressure during normal operations. The NuScale reactor is a passive, integral small modular pressurized water reactor (SMR) that uses natural circulation and eliminates the need for external piping and coolant pumps. Each NuScale Power Module (NPM) produces 160 MWt (about 50 MWe), with a 12-module plant generating a net output of approximately 570 MWe, and applicants referencing the design must provide construction schedules.

nuscale_ch01_0007.title: Schedule
nuscale_ch01_0007.summary: The section describes the NuScale containment vessel as a cylindrical, ASME-certified steel structure designed to withstand high-pressure events, with internal vacuum pressure during normal operations. The NuScale reactor is a passive, integral small modular pressurized water reactor, with each module producing about 50 MWe and a 12-module plant yielding a net output of approximately 570 MWe. The schedule requirement states that applicants referencing the NuScale design must provide their own construction and implementation schedules.

nuscale_ch01_0004.title: Containment Type
nuscale_ch01_0004.summary: The NuScale containment vessel is a cylindrical, steel, ASME-certified pressure vessel designed to withstand high-pressure events and operates under vacuum during normal conditions, eliminating the need for insulation. The NuScale reactor is a passive, small modular pressurized water reactor with integral components and natural circulation, removing the need for external piping and coolant pumps. Each module produces 160 MWt (about 50 MWe), and a plant can have up to 12 modules, yielding a total net output of approximately 570 MWe.
